description: Invoke a method on a named C# View Script from a View Package through Unity Bridge. The tool compiles or reuses the cached script, runs the requested public static method in Unity, and returns the method result.

viewId.description: View id containing the script, for example material-inspector.

scriptName.description: scripts[].name from view.json, for example InspectorViewApi.

method.description: Public static method to invoke, for example Read or Apply.

args.description: JSON object passed to the script method. Methods can accept zero parameters, a string JSON payload, object, or a typed request DTO; Locus deserializes typed DTOs in the Unity Bridge protocol layer.
